title: crotalaria micheliana
intro: Crotalaria micheliana, also known as a shrub or small tree in the pea family, is a plant native to tropical Africa and Madagascar. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly due to its high concentration of alkaloids and other compounds. The health benefits of Crotalaria micheliana include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic. Crotalaria micheliana has been traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
